name: Yala Safari Jeep Tour
description: Embark on an early morning safari through Sri Lanka's most iconic national park. Expert trackers guide you through diverse habitats in search of leopards, elephants, sloth bears, and exotic birdlife.

name: Sigiriya Sunrise Climb
description: Beat the crowds with an early morning ascent of the ancient Lion Rock. Watch the sunrise paint the plains gold as you explore the 5th-century fortress, royal gardens, and stunning frescoes.

name: Mirissa Whale Watching
description: Set sail into the Indian Ocean for a chance to see the largest animals on Earth. Blue whales, sperm whales, and playful dolphins are regularly spotted on this unforgettable marine adventure.

name: Ella Rock Hike
description: Trek through lush tea plantations and eucalyptus forests to the summit of Ella Rock. The panoramic views from the top — spanning misty valleys and distant mountains — are simply extraordinary.

name: Sri Lankan Cooking Class
description: Learn to cook authentic Sri Lankan dishes in a traditional village kitchen. Visit a local market to select fresh spices, then master the art of curry, hoppers, sambol, and more alongside a local chef.

name: Galle Fort Walking Tour
description: Stroll through centuries of history inside the UNESCO-listed Galle Fort. Discover Dutch colonial architecture, hidden temples, artisan workshops, and the best sunset spot on the ramparts.

name: Surf Lessons — Arugam Bay
description: Learn to ride the waves at one of the world's top 10 surf destinations. Professional instructors cater to all levels, from complete beginners to those looking to sharpen their skills on Arugam's legendary point breaks.

name: Tea Plantation Tour
description: Walk through emerald tea fields at 2,000m altitude and discover the art of Ceylon tea. Tour a working tea factory, learn the plucking-to-cup process, and enjoy a private tasting of some of the world's finest teas.

name: Kandy Cultural Dance Show
description: Experience the vibrant traditions of Kandyan dance and drumming in an electrifying live performance. Watch fire dancers, acrobats, and elaborately costumed performers bring Sri Lankan folklore to life.

name: Scuba Diving — Trincomalee
description: Dive into the crystal-clear waters of Pigeon Island and explore vibrant coral reefs teeming with tropical fish. PADI-certified instructors make this adventure accessible for beginners and thrilling for experienced divers.

name: Hot Air Balloon — Sigiriya
description: Float above the Cultural Triangle at dawn and witness Sigiriya Rock, ancient temples, and endless jungle from a breathtaking aerial perspective. An unforgettable once-in-a-lifetime experience.

name: Turtle Hatchery Visit
description: Visit a conservation hatchery dedicated to protecting Sri Lanka's endangered sea turtles. Learn about five species of marine turtles, watch hatchlings, and even help release baby turtles into the ocean at dusk.

name: Ayurveda Spa Experience
description: Immerse yourself in Sri Lanka's 3,000-year-old Ayurvedic tradition. Enjoy a personalized herbal consultation, therapeutic massage with medicated oils, and a rejuvenating steam bath in a serene tropical setting.

name: Scenic Train: Kandy to Ella
description: Often called the most beautiful train ride in the world, this journey winds through misty mountains, lush tea estates, cascading waterfalls, and the iconic Nine Arches Bridge. Sit by the open door and soak in every moment.

name: Stilt Fishing Experience
description: Try the iconic Sri Lankan tradition of stilt fishing along the southern coast. Local fishermen teach you the art of balancing on wooden poles planted in the ocean floor — a skill passed down through generations.
